blog.name: Blog Post Pipeline
blog.description: Creates a polished blog post from a topic
blog.context: Write as a blog post suitable for a tech blog. Use a conversational yet informative tone.

video_script.name: Video Script Pipeline
video_script.description: Creates a video script with timestamps and visual cues
video_script.context: Write as a video script with intro hook, main content sections, and outro. Include [VISUAL CUE] markers and approximate timestamps.

research.name: Research Report Pipeline
research.context: Write as an academic-style research report with abstract, methodology description, findings, analysis, and conclusion.

social_media.name: Social Media Pipeline
social_media.description: Creates social media content from a topic
social_media.context: Create social media content including: a Twitter/X thread (5-7 tweets), a LinkedIn post, and an Instagram caption. Make each platform-appropriate.
